parsed.cleanedTranscript:
Speaker 1: They want you afraid. Fear makes you easier to control.
Speaker 1: But we are not afraid.
Speaker 2: The streets shall once again run red.
Speaker 3: Raul Menendez ignited global unrest on an unprecedented scale.
Speaker 1: Menendez is a terrorist. We're bringing peace and security to the world.
Speaker 4: He refuses to let me go.
Speaker 5: Stop looking backwards, David, but what matters is what we do next.
Speaker 5: A lot of people counting on us for answers.
Speaker 5: Spectre 1, report.
Speaker 6: Need a sitrep.
Speaker 4: This isn't real. The hell it is.
Speaker 7: Obey our master, control our master.
Speaker 7: Master of the invisible, master of the space. Master of your mind, master of your fate.
Speaker 7: Master, master, wins and brings it all in after. Master, master, we will be the ones to cry.
Speaker 5: Pull it together, man!
Speaker 2: So eager to leave, are we?
Speaker 2: Kill them, men.
Speaker 8: It's a hell of a lot easier than killing the idea.
Speaker 2: You were never cut out to be a Mason.
Speaker 2: No more games. This ends now.
Speaker 7: Obey your master!
Speaker 3: Get the Reznov challenge pack. And you pre-order now.
Speaker 7: Master, master, wins and brings it all in after. Master, master, we will be the ones to cry. Obey your master!
Speaker 3: Get the Reznov challenge pack.

auditTrail.detail: Removed duplicated line repeated from chunk 2 at the chunk 2/3 boundary: 'Menendez is a terrorist. We're bringing peace and security to the world.'
Removed duplicated promotional line repeated from chunk 7 at the chunk 7/8 boundary: 'Get the Reznov challenge pack. And you pre-order now.'
Removed chunk headers and timestamps; preserved speaker labels and dialogue order.
Standardized sentence punctuation and normalized 'Terrorist' to lowercase 'terrorist' without changing meaning.

debug.notes: Mechanical transcript contained two clear boundary duplicates caused by chunk overlap. Kept all non-duplicated lines in chronological order. One line in chunk 2 extends past its nominal chunk end and was treated as overlap, not a separate utterance.

stitch.cleanedTranscript:
Speaker 1: They want you afraid. Fear makes you easier to control.
Speaker 1: But we are not afraid.
Speaker 2: The streets shall once again run red.
Speaker 3: Raul Menendez ignited global unrest on an unprecedented scale.
Speaker 1: Menendez is a terrorist. We're bringing peace and security to the world.
Speaker 4: He refuses to let me go.
Speaker 5: Stop looking backwards, David, but what matters is what we do next.
Speaker 5: A lot of people counting on us for answers.
Speaker 5: Spectre 1, report.
Speaker 6: Need a sitrep.
Speaker 4: This isn't real. The hell it is.
Speaker 7: Obey our master, control our master.
Speaker 7: Master of the invisible, master of the space. Master of your mind, master of your fate.
Speaker 7: Master, master, wins and brings it all in after. Master, master, we will be the ones to cry.
Speaker 5: Pull it together, man!
Speaker 2: So eager to leave, are we?
Speaker 2: Kill them, men.
Speaker 8: It's a hell of a lot easier than killing the idea.
Speaker 2: You were never cut out to be a Mason.
Speaker 2: No more games. This ends now.
Speaker 7: Obey your master!
Speaker 3: Get the Reznov challenge pack. And you pre-order now.
Speaker 7: Master, master, wins and brings it all in after. Master, master, we will be the ones to cry. Obey your master!
Speaker 3: Get the Reznov challenge pack.
